title: Feature Reduction Path
description: Build fluency in Feature Reduction inside Dimensionality Reduction by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.
featuredTermTitles: Dimensionality Reduction Techniques (e.g., PCA, t-SNE, UMAP)

steps.title: Principal Component Analysis (PCA)
steps.summary: Principal Component Analysis (PCA) belongs to the Dimensionality Reduction area of AI/ML, within Feature Reduction. It sits inside Dimensionality Reduction / Feature Reduction. Start after PCA and Principal Component Analysis. It opens into Principal Component Analysis (PCA) in Regression and principal component analysis (PCA) for embeddings.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA)

steps.title: PCA
steps.summary: PCA belongs to the Dimensionality Reduction area of AI/ML, within Feature Reduction. It sits inside Dimensionality Reduction / Feature Reduction. Compare it with Sparse PCA and Probabilistic PCA. It opens into Kernel PCA and Sparse PCA.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: UMAP
steps.summary: UMAP belongs to the Dimensionality Reduction area of AI/ML, within Feature Reduction. It sits inside Dimensionality Reduction / Feature Reduction. Compare it with UMAP Embedding and Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection (UMAP). It opens into UMAP Embedding and UMAP (Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
